plan.pageDescription: The page is showing a demo of TodoMVC, a collection of To-Do list applications built with different JavaScript frameworks and libraries. The page has some visible text describing the purpose of the demo, as well as a few interactive elements like an input field to add new todos and links to the real TodoMVC app and the creator's GitHub page.
testableActions: Verify that double-clicking a todo item opens it for editing
Verify that the 'Created by' and 'Part of' links work as expected

failures.testName: Verify double-click opens todo for editing
failures.failureReason: The test expects the `.edit` element to be visible, but it is not
failures.rootCause: The double-click action on the todo label is not triggering the edit mode as expected
failures.suggestedFix: Ensure that the double-click action on the todo label reliably triggers the edit mode and the `.edit` element becomes visible
